responses: Hello! How can I help with your pet today? 🐾

Dogs need a balanced diet with protein, carbs, and fats.
Feed your dog high-quality dog food twice a day.

Avoid giving milk to adult cats.

Bathe your dog once every 2–4 weeks.
Use pet-safe shampoo only.
Avoid over-bathing as it dries their skin.

If your dog is sick, consult a vet immediately.
Watch for symptoms like vomiting, weakness, or loss of appetite.
If your cat is sick, consult a vet.
Look for changes in eating or behavior.

Cats prefer quiet and private litter areas.

Keep your pet environment clean and safe.
